heading: Clone Documents
body:
You can insert new documents by cloning the schema and values of
an existing document in a collection.<Tab tabid="list-view">
  List View

  To clone a document, hover over the desired document
  and click the Clone button.

  ![Clone button](/_includes/images/atlas-ui/compass/clone-doc.png)
</Tab>JSON ViewTo clone a document, hover over the desired document
and click the Clone button.![Clone button JSON](/_includes/images/atlas-ui/compass/json-view-clone.png)Table ViewTo clone a document, hover over the desired document
and click the Clone button.![Clone button Table view](/_includes/images/atlas-ui/compass/table-view-clone.png)When you click the Clone button, Atlas opens the
document insertion dialog with the same schema and values as the cloned
document. You can edit any of these fields and values before you insert
the new document.
